summary.en: In South Korea, electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) for electrical equipment including industrial motors is regulated by MSIT (Ministry of Science and ICT) through the KCC (Korea Communications Commission) via the Radio Waves Act and related notices. KC Radio certification covers EMC emission and immunity. Industrial motors that generate electromagnetic interference must comply with applicable KC EMC limits; the KC Mark under ECPSA covers electrical safety, while KC Radio covers EMC. KS C standards adopted from CISPR and IEC 61000 series apply. Products must display KC Mark; conformity is assessed by accredited testing bodies (Korea Testing Laboratory, KTL, or equivalent).
summary.zh: 在韩国，包括工业电机在内的电气设备的电磁兼容性（EMC）由MSIT（科学和ICT部）通过KCC（韩国通信委员会）依据《电波法》及相关通知进行监管。KC无线电认证涵盖EMC发射和抗扰度。产生电磁干扰的工业电机须符合适用的KC EMC限值；ECPSA下的KC标志涵盖电气安全，KC无线电认证涵盖EMC。采用自CISPR和IEC 61000系列的KS C标准适用。产品须标注KC标志；合格评定由经认可的测试机构（韩国测试实验室、KTL或等效机构）进行。
summary.zht: 在韓國，包括工業電機在內的電氣設備的電磁相容性（EMC）由MSIT（科學和ICT部）通過KCC（韓國通信委員會）依據《電波法》及相關通知進行監管。KC無線電認證涵蓋EMC發射和抗擾度。產生電磁干擾的工業電機須符合適用的KC EMC限值；ECPSA下的KC標誌涵蓋電氣安全，KC無線電認證涵蓋EMC。採用自CISPR和IEC 61000系列的KS C標準適用。產品須標注KC標誌；合格評定由經認可的測試機構（韓國測試實驗室、KTL或等效機構）進行。

standards_or_laws: Radio Waves Act (전파법) and MSIT/KCC EMC notices
KS C CISPR 11 / KS C CISPR 14 (adopted CISPR emission standards)
Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (ECPSA) — KC Mark for safety

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for industrial equipment are governed by GB/T 4343 (CISPR 14 equivalent for household and similar equipment) and GB/T 17799 series (IEC 61000 equivalent, immunity). For industrial motors, GB 10069 covers noise and vibration; EMC is addressed under CCC mandatory certification for products in the CCC catalogue. SRRC (State Radio Regulation Committee) type approval applies to radio-emitting devices. Chinese EMC certifications (CCC, SRRC) do not substitute for South Korea's KC Radio certification.
summary.zh: 中国工业设备的EMC要求由GB/T 4343（等同于CISPR 14，适用于家用及类似设备）和GB/T 17799系列（等同IEC 61000，抗扰度）规范。对工业电机，GB 10069涵盖噪声和振动；CCC强制目录范围内产品的EMC在CCC强制认证下处理。SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型式认可适用于无线电发射设备。中国EMC认证（CCC、SRRC）不能替代韩国KC无线电认证。
summary.zht: 中國工業設備的EMC要求由GB/T 4343（等同於CISPR 14，適用於家用及類似設備）和GB/T 17799系列（等同IEC 61000，抗擾度）規範。對工業電機，GB 10069涵蓋噪聲和振動；CCC強制目錄範圍內產品的EMC在CCC強制認證下處理。SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型式認可適用於無線電發射設備。中國EMC認證（CCC、SRRC）不能替代韓國KC無線電認證。

standards_or_laws: CCC (mandatory catalogue scope covers EMC for listed products)

gap.en: Chinese CCC or SRRC EMC certifications do not satisfy South Korea's KC Radio (MSIT/KCC) requirements. Separate KC Radio conformity assessment at a South Korea-accredited laboratory is required. The underlying EMC test standards (KS C CISPR vs GB/T CISPR adoptions) may differ in amendment levels or local deviations. Motors must be tested and certified to KC Radio limits in South Korea.
gap.zh: 中国CCC或SRRC的EMC认证不满足韩国KC无线电（MSIT/KCC）要求。须在韩国认可的实验室进行单独的KC无线电合格评定。基础EMC测试标准（KS C CISPR与GB/T CISPR采用版本）在修正水平或本地偏差方面可能有所不同。电机须在韩国按KC无线电限值进行测试和认证。
gap.zht: 中國CCC或SRRC的EMC認證不滿足韓國KC無線電（MSIT/KCC）要求。須在韓國認可的實驗室進行單獨的KC無線電合格評定。基礎EMC測試標準（KS C CISPR與GB/T CISPR採用版本）在修正水準或本地偏差方面可能有所不同。電機須在韓國按KC無線電限值進行測試和認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC Radio certification required for industrial motors that fall within KCC EMC scope; KC Mark (ECPSA) for electrical safety separately mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC covers EMC for listed products; SRRC for radio-emitting devices; GB/T EMC standards apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC EMC certification and SRRC type approval do not substitute for South Korea's KC Radio certification under MSIT/KCC. Motors must be separately tested and certified for EMC compliance in South Korea. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC EMC认证和SRRC型式认可不能替代韩国MSIT/KCC下的KC无线电认证。电机须在韩国另行进行EMC合规测试和认证。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC EMC認證和SRRC型式認可不能替代韓國MSIT/KCC下的KC無線電認證。電機須在韓國另行進行EMC合規測試和認證。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — KS C IEC 61000 Series
requirement_topic.zh: EMC抗扰度 — KS C IEC 61000系列
requirement_topic.zht: EMC抗擾度 — KS C IEC 61000系列

summary.en: South Korea adopts KS C IEC 61000 series standards for electromagnetic immunity, covering voltage dips, short interruptions, surges, fast transients, and conducted/radiated immunity. Industrial motors must demonstrate adequate immunity to electromagnetic disturbances present on South Korea's 60 Hz grid. KC Radio certification assessment encompasses both emission and immunity testing. Immunity testing must be performed at 60 Hz grid simulation conditions to reflect actual South Korean operating environment.
summary.zh: 韩国采用KS C IEC 61000系列标准处理电磁抗扰度，涵盖电压跌落、短时中断、浪涌、快速瞬变及传导/辐射抗扰度。工业电机须证明对韩国60 Hz电网上存在的电磁干扰具有足够的抗扰度。KC无线电认证评定同时涵盖发射和抗扰度测试。抗扰度测试须在60 Hz电网模拟条件下进行，以反映韩国实际运行环境。
summary.zht: 韓國採用KS C IEC 61000系列標準處理電磁抗擾度，涵蓋電壓跌落、短時中斷、浪湧、快速瞬變及傳導/輻射抗擾度。工業電機須證明對韓國60 Hz電網上存在的電磁干擾具有足夠的抗擾度。KC無線電認證評定同時涵蓋發射和抗擾度測試。抗擾度測試須在60 Hz電網模擬條件下進行，以反映韓國實際運行環境。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 61000-4 series (immunity test methods, adopted IEC 61000-4)
KS C IEC 61000-6 series (generic immunity standards)
Radio Waves Act and KCC EMC notices (immunity scope)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 17799 series (equivalent to IEC 61000 series) for electromagnetic immunity of industrial equipment. Immunity testing in China is performed at 50 Hz grid simulation. For products in the CCC mandatory catalogue, immunity is assessed as part of CCC certification. Chinese immunity test reports at 50 Hz cannot be directly used for South Korea's 60 Hz KC Radio immunity certification without re-testing.
summary.zh: 中国以GB/T 17799系列（等同IEC 61000系列）处理工业设备的电磁抗扰度。中国的抗扰度测试在50 Hz电网模拟条件下进行。对于CCC强制目录范围内的产品，抗扰度作为CCC认证的一部分进行评定。中国50 Hz条件下的抗扰度测试报告，未经在60 Hz下重新测试，不能直接用于韩国60 Hz KC无线电认证。
summary.zht: 中國以GB/T 17799系列（等同IEC 61000系列）處理工業設備的電磁抗擾度。中國的抗擾度測試在50 Hz電網模擬條件下進行。對於CCC強制目錄範圍內的產品，抗擾度作為CCC認證的一部分進行評定。中國50 Hz條件下的抗擾度測試報告，未經在60 Hz下重新測試，不能直接用於韓國60 Hz KC無線電認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799 series (IEC 61000 equivalent, immunity at 50 Hz)
CCC certification (immunity component for listed products)

gap.en: Chinese immunity test reports at 50 Hz cannot be directly accepted for South Korea's KC Radio certification. Testing must be performed at 60 Hz simulation to reflect South Korean grid conditions. Additionally, any local KS C deviations from IEC 61000 base standards must be observed. A new round of immunity testing is required even if the motor's basic design is otherwise compliant.
gap.zh: 在50 Hz条件下的中国抗扰度测试报告，不能直接用于韩国KC无线电认证。须在60 Hz模拟条件下进行测试以反映韩国电网条件。此外，须遵守KS C标准对IEC 61000基础标准的任何本地偏差。即使电机基本设计本身合规，也须重新进行一轮抗扰度测试。
gap.zht: 在50 Hz條件下的中國抗擾度測試報告，不能直接用於韓國KC無線電認證。須在60 Hz模擬條件下進行測試以反映韓國電網條件。此外，須遵守KS C標準對IEC 61000基礎標準的任何本地偏差。即使電機基本設計本身合規，也須重新進行一輪抗擾度測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity assessment required as part of KC Radio certification for industrial motors in KCC scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-listed products; GB/T 17799 immunity standards apply at 50 Hz

source.publisher: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese 50 Hz immunity test data cannot be directly applied to South Korea's 60 Hz KC Radio immunity assessment. Re-testing at 60 Hz grid simulation conditions at a South Korea-accredited laboratory is required. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国50 Hz抗扰度测试数据不能直接用于韩国60 Hz KC无线电抗扰度评定。须在韩国认可的实验室按60 Hz电网模拟条件重新测试。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國50 Hz抗擾度測試數據不能直接用於韓國60 Hz KC無線電抗擾度評定。須在韓國認可的實驗室按60 Hz電網模擬條件重新測試。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
